chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1770 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 18-10-2023 Mr. Sohail Ahmed Khoso, Advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Samiulllah Soomro, Advocate for respondents-Workers Welfare Board Sindh. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the respondents-Workers Welfare Board Sindh submits that the grievance of the petitioners has been resolved and they have been granted Time Scale Promotion w.e.f 01.11.2015 and 01.11.2020 respectively. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied, but has raised issue of arrears, which learned counsel for the respondents undertakes to look into and after a proper audit, resolve the same. This petition is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
